instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect vehicle speed sensor faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Status equals Invalid.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Status = Invalid THEN Sensor_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect transmission oil temperature sensor failure.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Oil_Temp_Sensor_Status equals Invalid.

L4_requirements: IF Oil_Temp_Sensor_Status = Invalid THEN Sensor_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect engine speed sensor faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Engine_Speed_Signal equals Invalid.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed_Signal = Invalid THEN Sensor_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect pressure sensor faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Hydraulic_Pressure_Sensor_Status equals Invalid.

L4_requirements: IF Hydraulic_Pressure_Sensor_Status = Invalid THEN Sensor_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall switch to fallback strategy when sensor signals are invalid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate fallback logic when Sensor_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect inconsistent sensor values.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when sensor signals are outside valid range.

L4_requirements: IF Sensor_Value > Max_Limit THEN Sensor_Fault = TRUE
IF Sensor_Value < Min_Limit THEN Sensor_Fault = TRUE
IF Sensor_Value BETWEEN Min_Limit AND Max_Limit THEN Maintain_Normal_Operation

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect missing sensor messages.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when sensor communication timeout occurs.

L4_requirements: IF Sensor_Timeout = TRUE THEN Sensor_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate faulty sensors.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify faulty sensor when Fault_Code equals Sensor_Fault.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable shifting when critical sensors fail.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shifting when Sensor_Fault_Level equals Critical.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restore normal operation when sensor faults are cleared.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear sensor fault status when Sensor_Status equals Valid.
